freecad_gitpdm/ui/panel.py.note: Bumped from 2500: G3 storage-mode UI (~2550) then G5 session-lock heartbeat, shallow-clone banner/Deepen action, first-run hint (merged together, ~2616).

freecad_gitpdm/ui/github_auth.py.note: Bumped from 760 to 1000 to stop the guard from being a recurring nag; 750 is the size we'd like to trim back toward, not a hard limit.

freecad_gitpdm/ui/repo_validator.py.note: Bumped from 550: G3 storage-mode caching + G5 session-lock/shallow-clone hooks in _handle_valid_repo/_handle_invalid_repo, merged together (~564).

freecad_gitpdm/git/client.py.note: Bumped from 2000: provider-aware headless credential username (_headless_credential_username), fixing a hardcoded GitHub-only assumption that broke container auth for GitLab.
